testcase.name: poll endpoints return json content type
All public endpoints return json content type

testcase.name: No endpoint returns success key
testcase.file: Response Format Consistency (Tests\Feature\Api\ResponseStandardization\ResponseFormatConsistency)::No endpoint returns success key

testcase.name: 404 responses are json not html
testcase.file: Response Format Consistency (Tests\Feature\Api\ResponseStandardization\ResponseFormatConsistency)::404 responses are json not html

testcase.name: Collections use data key not entity names
testcase.file: Response Format Consistency (Tests\Feature\Api\ResponseStandardization\ResponseFormatConsistency)::Collections use data key not entity names

testcase.name: Paginated endpoints use meta not pagination

testcase.name: Auth endpoints return 401 json not redirect

testcase.name: Validation errors use standard format

testcase.name: Single resources wrapped in data key
